name: Utopia City
short_description: You are responsible for the salvation of humankind - destroy Utopia City or suffer indefinite virtual slavery. Fight for the future of the real world as you become involved in massive combat scenes against a host of powerful opponents. You are the last hope for the survival of your race!
detailed_description:
Utopia City is an action-packed first person shooter set in the virtual world of Utopia.

You are responsible for the salvation of humankind - destroy Utopia City or suffer indefinite virtual slavery. Fight for the future of the real world as you become involved in massive combat scenes against a host of powerful opponents. You are the last hope for the survival of your race!

• Absorbing story line

• High energy, blasting gameplay

• Outstanding sound effects and musical score

• An arsenal of futuristic weapons

• Dozens of unique characters

• Real time physics

Are you a real hero?

English*, Polish*, Russian*, German
*languages with full audio support
